kinds.description: Implementation replacement where declared public surfaces remain unchanged.
Public API replacement or public contract shape change.
ABI, header, symbol, calling convention, or native boundary replacement.
Schema replacement or incompatible schema evolution.
Protocol, message, encoding, or transport contract replacement.
Persisted artifact format replacement affecting durable artifacts.
Provider, backend, adapter, or capability implementation replacement.
Module descriptor, composition, command/view/document binding, or implementation replacement.
Package, pack, profile, bundle, lock, or mount format replacement.
Save artifact or saved-state format replacement.
Replay, trace, or determinism proof format replacement.
Command input, output, execution, refusal, or exposure surface replacement.
Ownership, include/import, or dependency direction boundary replacement.
Directory subtree or root ownership replacement.
Validator, test, AIDE, release, or repository tool replacement.
Generated projection, mirror, archive, or emitted surface replacement.
